copy.headline: Melbourne Valley Iron Replacement & Repair
copy.subheadline: Stop stubborn leaks with professional valley replacement.
copy.body: Corroded and rusted valley irons are the leading cause of roof leaks in Melbourne's older homes. When valley mortar deteriorates and the metal rusts out, water bypasses your gutters and floods your roof cavity. We expertly remove the old rusted metal, install premium Colorbond® valley irons, and re-bed the valley cuts with modern, flexible pointing to ensure a watertight seal.
copy.intro_text: Don't let a rusted valley iron ruin your ceiling. Our expert roofers diagnose and fix valley leaks quickly, replacing old galvanized iron with durable, rust-resistant materials.
copy.closing_text: Secure your roof before the next Melbourne storm. Contact us for a free inspection of your roof valleys.
copy.long_body_1: A roof valley is where two sloping roof panels meet, channeling massive volumes of rainwater into your gutters. Over decades, the original galvanized iron valleys rust, split, or become blocked with leaf debris. Additionally, the mortar (bedding) holding the valley tiles in place often cracks and falls away, creating a direct path for water to enter your ceiling.
copy.long_body_2: Our professional valley repair and replacement service addresses the root cause of the leak. We don't just patch over the problem with silicone. We strip out the old valley iron, clear any blockages, and install a brand new, high-quality Colorbond® valley tray. We then meticulously re-cut and re-bed the surrounding tiles, finishing with a flexible pointing compound that moves with your roof and won't crack under thermal expansion.
copy.long_body_3: Upgrading to modern Colorbond® materials not only stops current leaks but prevents future rusting, providing superior protection against Melbourne's harsh and unpredictable weather. We back our valley replacements with a comprehensive 10-year workmanship warranty for your peace of mind.
benefit_list: Removal of old rusted valley irons and debris
Free, no-obligation roof inspection and quote
Fast response for active ceiling leaks
copy.service_description: Stop leaks with professional valley iron replacement in Melbourne. We install premium Colorbond valleys with flexible pointing. 10-year warranty included.
